prohibited_use_cases.description: Provider terms, account tier, output ownership, platform rights, or redistribution rights are missing or ambiguous.
Generated voice resembles or is derived from a real person without written consent, performer rights, and legal/audio review.
Generated melody, hook, stem, lyric, or music bed resembles protected work or has unclear training/output rights.
Prompt or output imitates named performers, celebrities, composers, voice actors, sound designers, brands, or protected signature styles.
Hazard, rescue, guide-command, collision, or safety-relevant cue cannot be reproduced, audited, or similarity-checked.
Whitewater, raft, paddle, rock, or rescue realism relies on AI output without clear output rights, provenance, reproducibility, and release-gate approval.
Synthetic voice could be mistaken for a human player, guide, streamer, or team member without explicit labeling and permission.
